name: mcp-erid
description: Russian ad marking (38-FZ) checker: erid validation, ad-page audit, compliance hints.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_ERID_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key (Pro tier) for batch ad-placement auditing (audit_batch). Optional: verify_erid, audit_ad_page, check_compliance_38fz and explain_marking_requirement work without a key.
